Review this Minecraft {{MINECRAFT_VERSION}} mod PR for correctness and maintainability:
  - Bugs, logic errors, or edge cases that will cause problems
  - Performance issues: inefficient tick loops, unnecessary chunk loading, resource leaks
  - Minecraft/{{API_NAME}} misuse: capability system errors, broken entity AI patterns
  - VillageTale violations: zone system misuse, incorrect villager/work mechanics

Flag issues that will cause problems or make future maintenance harder.
Don't comment on style preferences (bracing, comment density) unless they obscure understanding.
